children.name: From contract to booking in three steps.
children.characters: From contract to booking in three steps.

children.name: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.
children.characters: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book.

children.name: We plug into your GDS & NDC contracts.
children.characters: We plug into your GDS & NDC contracts.

children.name: You keep your Sabre, Amadeus or Travelport agreements & we configure the platform in week one. No new contracts. No renegotiation. NDC connections added automatically.
children.characters: You keep your Sabre, Amadeus or Travelport agreements & we configure the platform in week one. No new contracts. No renegotiation. NDC connections added automatically.

children.name: Your agents type the route once. The platform fires parallel queries to all connected GDS and NDC sources at the same millisecond. Average fare saving vs single-GDS: ~23%.
children.characters: Your agents type the route once. The platform fires parallel queries to all connected GDS and NDC sources at the same millisecond. Average fare saving vs single-GDS: ~23%.

children.name: Book, and analyse: one branded portal.
children.characters: Book, and analyse: one branded portal.

children.name: Everything inside your white-label platform. Book fares, issue tickets, set price alerts, pull reports under your own brand. Your data in your database. No shared logins. Full ownership.
children.characters:
Everything inside your white-label platform. Book fares, issue tickets, set price alerts, pull reports under your own brand.
Your data in your database. No shared logins. Full ownership.

children.name: Your brand. Your data. Your platform.
